variants.title: Fleetguard LF3390 Lube Filter, Spin-On | Replaces the Donaldson P550159
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard LF3390 Lube Filter, Spin-On | Replaces the Donaldson P550159
variants.description: Fleetguard® LF3390 spin-on lube filter meets or exceeds OE performance requirements and the new challenges of modern engine technology.
specifications: Style: Hydraulic/Lube Spin-On, Outer Diameter: 96.8 mm, Length: 107.2 mm, Thread: 13/16-16 UN, Bypass Pressure: 0.6 BAR bar, Bypass Pressure Bypass pressure relieve build-up of pressure within the system and allows medium to bypass the element when pressure increases and reaches a sufficient level.: 0.6 BAR

variants.title: Donaldson P550159 Hydraulic/Lube Spin-On
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P550159 Hydraulic/Lube Spin-On is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
specifications: Style: Hydraulic/Lube Spin-On, Outer Diameter: 96.8 mm, Length: 107.2 mm, Thread: 13/16-16 UN, Bypass Pressure: 0.6 BAR bar, Bypass Pressure Bypass pressure relieve build-up of pressure within the system and allows medium to bypass the element when pressure increases and reaches a sufficient level.: 0.6 BAR
